발표 제목 (Title): Accuracy Assessment of UAV Photogrammetry for DEM Generation in an Institutional Environment
초록 (Abstract): This poster evaluates the accuracy of UAV photogrammetry for Digital Elevation Model generation through comparison with Differential GNSS ground survey data at Federal Polytechnic Nekede, Nigeria.

발표 제목 (Title): Hiroshima "Atomic Bomb Drawings" Visualization Project (Poster)
초록 (Abstract): An 'Atomic Bomb Drawings' project in which high school students in Hiroshima create paintings based on survivors' testimonies. Presented as an interactive, map-based digital archive using Re:Earth platform.

발표 제목 (Title): Eurostat vs OSM vs Census: Choosing Open Mobility Data for Urban Function Maps
초록 (Abstract): Which open mobility dataset should you trust for urban function analysis? Using Copernicus Urban Atlas polygons, we compare Eurostat experimental MNO statistics, OpenStreetMap GPS traces, and census commuting flows.

발표 제목 (Title): Integration of Numerical Weather Prediction Models: A 3D Spatial Information Approach
초록 (Abstract): This presentation introduces a workflow for converting numerical weather prediction data from the Korea Meteorological Administration into real-time 3D visualizations using the open-source CesiumJS platform.

발표 제목 (Title): ImageN for GeoSpatial
초록 (Abstract): Introducing ImageN as amazing raster image procession engine for the Java GeoSpatial Community.

발표 제목 (Title): Citizen-Driven War Memory Mapping: Enabling Non-Experts to Build Geospatial Archives with Re:Earth CMS and Visualizer
초록 (Abstract): In Nagaoka, Japan, 23 citizens aged 11-70+ with no GIS experience mapped the 1945 air raid using Re:Earth, an open-source WebGIS platform.

발표 제목 (Title): Geospatial Data Gateway: Composing Spatial Features Across Databases and APIs
초록 (Abstract): A lightweight Geospatial Data Gateway built with Go that composes spatial features from multiple databases and APIs at request time, serving enriched GeoJSON through OGC API Features standard.

발표 제목 (Title): GeoGirafe: a community-driven WebGIS built plugin by plugin
초록 (Abstract): GeoGirafe is a framework-free WebGIS built on standard WebComponents. This talk presents its feature set, plugin-based architecture, community governance model, and the funding structure.

발표 제목 (Title): Green Infrastructure Baseline using Open-Source Geospatial Data for Dammam, Saudi Arabia
초록 (Abstract): This study analyzes multi decadal spatiotemporal land cover change in Dammam, Saudi Arabia (1986-2025) to establish a green infrastructure baseline using Landsat and Sentinel-2 data classified using Random Forest in QGIS.

발표 제목 (Title): Using AI and Digital Twin in Solving One of the World's Most Plastic Polluting River
초록 (Abstract): The Pasig River in Metro Manila is a major global source of ocean plastic pollution. Leveraging digital twin and AI-Machine Learning models, this project enables real-time monitoring and predictive analysis of plastic waste flows.

발표 제목 (Title): Ensuring Tile Quality in MapLibre Through Automated Testing and CI
초록 (Abstract): This talk presents how MapLibre approaches tile quality using automated testing and CI pipelines, sharing practical lessons and reusable patterns for open-source geospatial projects.

발표 제목 (Title): Bridging LLM and GIS via Model Context Protocol for Conversational Flood Data Analysis
초록 (Abstract): This study proposes a Conversational GIS system that integrates LLM with MCP, allowing non-technical users to access and analyze geospatial data through natural language, supporting flood risk analysis.

발표 제목 (Title): DigiAgriApp, 2026 updates
초록 (Abstract): DigiAgriApp is a free open-source suite to monitor agricultural fields. It is a comprehensive client-server platform designed to manage agricultural data with high granularity, from fields down to individual plants.

발표 제목 (Title): DHIS2 to QGIS: Geospatial Analysis of Climate-Associated Health Data in Madagascar
초록 (Abstract): Madagascar uses open-source tools such as DHIS2 and QGIS to geospatialize health data, enabling database management, automated indicators, spatial analysis, dashboards, and interactive web platforms.

발표 제목 (Title): Shifting from a monolithic to a scalable SDI architecture: is it worth it?
초록 (Abstract): This presentation concerns migrating an SDI from a single-machine, multi-container Docker architecture to a cluster-based solution, including performance testing results and evaluation of potential bottlenecks.

발표 제목 (Title): GeoNode as a Foundation for Research Data Management Infrastructure
초록 (Abstract): This work presents the adaptation of GeoNode into a FAIR-compliant research data management (RDM) infrastructure for agricultural science.

발표 제목 (Title): Current GIS Applications in Hokkaido Agriculture and Hokuren's FOSS4G Initiatives with QGIS
초록 (Abstract): This presentation introduces how GIS is currently used in agriculture in Hokkaido. We also present Hokuren's initiatives and future plans for utilizing FOSS4G technologies, particularly QGIS.

발표 제목 (Title): Mapping Peace: A GIS-Based Storytelling Platform for Global Peace Education from Hiroshima
초록 (Abstract): This research develops interactive peace education platforms integrating GIS with storytelling functions. In 2025, all atomic bomb-related sites within five kilometers of Hiroshima's hypocenter were mapped on Re:Earth.

발표 제목 (Title): The Challenge of Open Point Cloud Data: What has a local government brought to our communities?
초록 (Abstract): We introduce 'Virtual Shizuoka,' a high-density 3D point cloud dataset published as open data by Shizuoka prefecture. We present its use cases, focusing mainly on transforming the community through collaborative efforts.

발표 제목 (Title): "You are here" - but what if I'm not?
초록 (Abstract): Presenting a webapp to track your location on a photo of a physical map

발표 제목 (Title): pgRouting project status
초록 (Abstract): pgRouting project status presentation. Come and find out the latest news on the project as well as future plans, and how to get involved!

발표 제목 (Title): City2Graph: Open Source Python Library for GeoAI with Graph Neural Networks
초록 (Abstract): City2Graph is an open-source Python library bridging GIS, network science, and geospatial artificial intelligence (GeoAI) with Graph Neural Networks (GNNs). It offers a unified pipeline with conversion between GeoPandas, NetworkX, and PyTorch Geometric.

발표 제목 (Title): Japan Geospatial Times: Exploring the History and Use Cases of Geospatial Technologies in Japan
초록 (Abstract): Exploring Japan's geospatial technology, history, use cases, and challenges through Japan Geospatial Times, an open-source blog documenting geospatial applications in Japan.

발표 제목 (Title): Text2Transit: From SNS posts to Timetable Aware Multi-stop Train Itineraries with Open Geospatial Tools
초록 (Abstract): We present an open geospatial workflow that adapts LLMs for structured geospatial extraction from SNS posts and uses optimization to generate timetable aware multi stop rail itineraries.

발표 제목 (Title): The #1 plugin for QGIS
초록 (Abstract): First ever FOSS4G talk on QuickMapServices, the #1 QGIS plugin. Seriously.

발표 제목 (Title): Leveraging Open Geospatial Data in Journalism: Visualization and Analysis Workflows at Nikkei Visual Data
초록 (Abstract): Nikkei Visual Data produces digital news content. This presentation introduces how FOSS4G technologies contribute to article production through visualization using MapLibre and vector tiles, as well as data analysis with tools such as QGIS.

발표 제목 (Title): Sustaining Open Source: Real models, Real lessons
초록 (Abstract): This session is aimed at developers, project leads, and organisational decision-makers navigating the question of how to sustain FOSS4G, with a clear framework for thinking about sustainability.

발표 제목 (Title): Building Modern GIS Applications on Cloud Native Infrastructure
초록 (Abstract): Eliminate idle costs with a scale-to-zero, cloud-native GIS architecture using DuckDB and serverless mapping with PMTiles. Learn to build sustainable, fast GIS applications across any cloud provider.

발표 제목 (Title): Rekichizu: Designing Modern-Style Historical Maps to Preserve Cultural Memory
초록 (Abstract): Rekichizu is a web service for exploring historical maps of Japan in a modern digital map style. Through data creation with QGIS and collaborative open data production with CODH, it makes historical landscapes accessible.

발표 제목 (Title): GeoAgent: A QGIS Plugin for Natural Language-Driven Geospatial Analysis
초록 (Abstract): GeoAgent is a QGIS plugin that integrates large language models to enable natural language interaction with geospatial data, allowing users to explore layers, perform spatial analysis, and automate geoprocessing workflows.

발표 제목 (Title): Apache SIS for integrated metadata, referencing and grid coverage services
초록 (Abstract): Apache SIS is a Java library for metadata, referencing, feature and grid coverage services with a focus on implementing OGC/ISO abstract models.

발표 제목 (Title): Leaflet 2.0 is coming – it's official!
초록 (Abstract): Although an alpha version has been available on the Leaflet website for over a year, it remained unclear for a long time what we could actually expect. Now there is more information.

발표 제목 (Title): Current status and challenges of FOSS4G's Japanese localization
초록 (Abstract): FOSS4G software often has an international user base. This presentation will discuss the history, current status, and challenges of Japanese localization.

발표 제목 (Title): Bringing Old Maps & Illustrated Maps to the Web: 10 Years of Maplat and Turning Misalignment into Innovation
초록 (Abstract): Maplat is an open-source platform enabling bidirectional coordinate transformation between historical or illustrated maps and modern maps. Celebrating its 10th anniversary.

발표 제목 (Title): EIA Scoping Tool and Collaborative Authoring and Review System
초록 (Abstract): This presentation introduces a spatial system integrating an Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA) scoping tool with online authoring and review functions built with OpenLayers.

발표 제목 (Title): Reusable Geospatial Application Design for the Global South with MapLibre, STAC, and TiTiler
초록 (Abstract): This talk presents a reusable geospatial platform architecture for operational use in the Global South using MapLibre GL JS, STAC, and TiTiler.

발표 제목 (Title): QGIS + VS Code = DevTools
초록 (Abstract): Developing QGIS plugins and using VS Code as your IDE? Get comfortable with DevTools for QGIS.

발표 제목 (Title): From field data collection to web-based analysis and sharing: building the PINOGIO geospatial platform
초록 (Abstract): PINOGIO connects gPocket for field data collection with a web platform for project management, map production, and story-map publishing using open-source technologies.

발표 제목 (Title): Mapping the Drivers of Deforestation in REDD+ Project Areas across the Brazilian Amazon
초록 (Abstract): This study analyzes 95 forest carbon projects (~104,000 km²) using MapBiomas data integrated in GIS. Spatial analyses, mixed-effects models, and explainable AI identify drivers of deforestation.

발표 제목 (Title): Serving earth observation data with GeoServer: addressing real world requirements
초록 (Abstract): This presentation demonstrates how GeoServer enables efficient management, discovery, and visualization of large Earth observation datasets, covering STAC/OpenSearch, Cloud Optimized GeoTIFFs, mosaicking and more.

발표 제목 (Title): GeoServer 3 tour
초록 (Abstract): A practical tour of GeoServer 3 covering upgrade steps, new requirements, refreshed UI, and updated module structure. Learn what's changed and how to transition from GeoServer 2.x efficiently.

발표 제목 (Title): Under the Hood: Understanding MVCC and Tuning Autovacuum for High-Performance PostgreSQL
초록 (Abstract): It is now important for PostgreSQL admins to understand the internals of autovacuum and the MVCC implementation. Let us discuss MVCC and autovacuum in detail.

발표 제목 (Title): SLA4GIS: international association of organizations providing technical support for OpenSource GIS
초록 (Abstract): Presentation introduces the SLA4GIS concept – its idea, scope, technical support principles, membership certification process and request handling mechanism for FOSS4G support.

발표 제목 (Title): From NDVI to 260+ Indices: Five Years of Awesome Spectral Indices
초록 (Abstract): Awesome Spectral Indices (ASI) is an open, community-driven catalogue for spectral indices. Five years after its first release, ASI supports 260+ indices across multiple programming languages and platforms.

발표 제목 (Title): Kartore: A Style Editor and Toolkit for MapLibre
초록 (Abstract): This talk introduces Kartore, a project centered around a style editor for MapLibre, covering motivation, design approach, editing capabilities, and planned extensions.

발표 제목 (Title): landlensdb: A Python Package for Managing Proximity Sensing Imagery
초록 (Abstract): We introduce landlensdb, an open-source Python package for managing proximity sensing imagery using PostgreSQL/PostGIS. It automates metadata extraction and enables scalable spatial-temporal queries.

발표 제목 (Title): Programmatic Approaches to Exploring and Working with NASA-ISRO Synthetic Aperture Radar (NISAR) Mission Datasets
초록 (Abstract): The NISAR mission launched in July 2025, and data is now publicly available. This poster presents resources and guidance for working with NISAR data programmatically using open-source packages.

발표 제목 (Title): Mapping What's Hidden: YouthMappers and Urban Drainage Completeness for Flood and Dengue Risk in OSM
초록 (Abstract): This lightning talk documents a YouthMappers-led effort to map hidden urban waterways infrastructure in OpenStreetMap and shows how improved completeness changes spatial risk outputs.

발표 제목 (Title): From Zero to Mapping Mojo: Teaching QGIS Through Hands-On Workshops
초록 (Abstract): This talk presents lessons from QGIS workshops, highlighting hands-on learning, open data and adaptive teaching to build user skills from beginners to advanced practitioners.

발표 제목 (Title): Multitemporal Evaluation of Water Quality with Sentinel-1 and Sentinel-2 (2018-2025)
초록 (Abstract): This study evaluates water quality in Guayas, Ecuador, using Sentinel-1 and -2 satellite imagery from 2018 to 2025, analyzing turbidity, chlorophyll, and water presence indices.

발표 제목 (Title): Drawing the Lines: Visualizing the role of climate change and urbanization shaping human-bear interactions in Japan
초록 (Abstract): Japan has witnessed a surge in human-bear interactions. This phenomenon can potentially be traced back to dual pressures of climate change, urbanization significantly altering bear habitats and food sources.

발표 제목 (Title): QGIS "Ask me Anything" session
초록 (Abstract): This session is your once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to ask Marco Bernasocchi (QGIS.org Chairperson) and Nyall Dawson (QGIS Core Contributor) anything about QGIS.

발표 제목 (Title): A Practical Workflow for Reusing Proprietary Stormwater Model Data in Open-Source GIS Using CSV and SWMM Formats
초록 (Abstract): This presentation introduces a practical workflow for converting proprietary stormwater model data into open formats using CSV and SWMM inputs, enabling reuse and visualization in QGIS and Giswater.

발표 제목 (Title): Portable Spatial-Semantic RAG for 3D City Models Using DuckDB
초록 (Abstract): 'Find me sunny buildings near Hiroshima Station.' This talk presents a portable DuckDB-based approach to 3D city model search that combines spatial, semantic, and geometric cues.

발표 제목 (Title): GeoTools Update
초록 (Abstract): GeoTools is an open source Java library that provides tools for geospatial data. Attend for a quick check in with the GeoTools as a vibrant OSGeo Project.

발표 제목 (Title): Python-Based Dashboard Development Using Geospatial Data
초록 (Abstract): Developing Dashboard that visualizes a wide range of statistical data on a map using Streamlit, a Python library.

발표 제목 (Title): How map engine optimizes your visualization
초록 (Abstract): Web map engines perform dozens of optimizations to render geographic features at interactive frame rates. This talk reveals the internal mechanisms from GPU optimization to Web Worker task scheduling.

발표 제목 (Title): Designing and Developing for Disaster Resilience: Building Public-Good Geospatial Tools People Actually Use
초록 (Abstract): Wildfire risk data only saves homes if people can act on it. This talk explores how FOSS4G tools bridge open data and user-centered design to build free, nation-scale wildfire applications for disaster resilience.

발표 제목 (Title): Small Robot Mapping Using Local Mesh Communication and Open-Source Sensors
초록 (Abstract): This project presents a low-cost educational multi-robot mapping prototype using ESP32 microcontrollers, open-source sensors, and local mesh communication.

발표 제목 (Title): Pacific Tides App
초록 (Abstract): The Pacific Tides App provides offline access to tide, moon, and sun information for Pacific Island countries after a one-time data download.

발표 제목 (Title): Rust for Geospatial ETL: High-Throughput Conversion of Japan's Land Parcel Data
초록 (Abstract): Japan's cadastral land-parcel open data ships as massive proprietary XML files. This talk describes a Rust port of the official Python converter, cutting nationwide conversion down from hours to minutes.

발표 제목 (Title): Development of a Wildfire Fireline Visualization Pilot System Using Open-Source GIS Technologies
초록 (Abstract): This study introduces a three-dimensional GIS-based wildfire fireline visualization system developed using open-source GIS technologies, aimed at real-time wildfire monitoring.

발표 제목 (Title): Training without Barriers: Lessons for Building Geospatial Capacity
초록 (Abstract): Training is often treated as an afterthought in the geospatial industry. This talk shares practical lessons from delivering and creating training for GIS, remote sensing, and earth observation.

발표 제목 (Title): Detecting Quarry Pond Remnants on a Japanese Island Heritage Site Using Sentinel-2 Imagery
초록 (Abstract): This study applies Sentinel-2 satellite imagery and open-source Python tools to detect and map quarry pond remnants on Kitagi Island, a designated heritage site in Japan's Seto Inland Sea.

발표 제목 (Title): Interactive web mapping with Equal Earth projection
초록 (Abstract): Most of today's web maps use the Web Mercator projection, which distorts area sizes. This talk shows recent improvements in web mapping libraries for using the Equal Earth map projection.

발표 제목 (Title): The Map of Our History: The Journey of OSGeo Brazil
초록 (Abstract): This lightning talk traces the inspiring journey of OSGeo Brazil, from informal online forums to hosting the monumental FOSS4G in the Amazon.

발표 제목 (Title): Git Blame: AI Edition
초록 (Abstract): AI is really helpful to assist in writing code, but who taught AI to code? This talk explores intellectual property issues with AI-assisted code and open source software licenses.

발표 제목 (Title): Working with NASA-ISRO Synthetic Aperture Radar (NISAR) Mission Data in QGIS
초록 (Abstract): The NISAR mission launched in July 2025. This poster presents resources and guidance for accessing and working with analysis-ready NISAR data in QGIS.

발표 제목 (Title): GeoLLM in the Wild: Open Source AI Meets Geospatial
초록 (Abstract): From GeoNetwork semantic search to agentic GIS automation, Camptocamp shares two years of hands-on open source GeoLLM experimentation — what works, what doesn't, and what the OSGeo community should build next.

발표 제목 (Title): Machi-Space: The Urban Digital Twin Platform Powered by Project PLATEAU
초록 (Abstract): 'Machi-Space' empowers non-experts to take an active role in the planning process, effectively changing traditional urban development workflows through digital twin technology.

발표 제목 (Title): Awakening Dormant Geospatial Data: Structuring Large-Scale Government Documents with LLM
초록 (Abstract): We use LLM to extract and structure geospatial data buried in 100K-1M+ PDF and Office files held by Japan's MLIT, enabling visualization, spatial analysis, and evidence-based policymaking.

발표 제목 (Title): Data publishing simplified with GeoCat Bridge
초록 (Abstract): Bridge is a plugin for your favorite desktop GIS that makes it easy to publish your data to map and catalog services.

발표 제목 (Title): Detecting Rooftop Solar Panels with Deep Learning, using Open Remote Sensing Data and OpenStreetMap
초록 (Abstract): Introducing a deep learning-based rooftop solar model using open remote sensing data and OpenStreetMap, demonstrated through use in the Climate Action Navigator.

발표 제목 (Title): State of STAC: From Specification to Infrastructure
초록 (Abstract): STAC has evolved into core geospatial infrastructure. This talk covers its current state, real-world adoption, key challenges, and how it fits into emerging architectures.

발표 제목 (Title): Estimation of Soil Organic Carbon and Total Nitrogen in Thailand's Rubber Plantations Using Machine Learning
초록 (Abstract): Soil organic carbon (SOC) and total nitrogen were estimated using Sentinel-2 vegetation indices and machine learning in northeastern Thailand, with Random Forest achieving R²=0.63 for SOC.

발표 제목 (Title): QGIS Hub: The Community Resource Ecosystem You Might Not Know About
초록 (Abstract): This talk introduces hub.qgis.org and the QGIS Hub Plugin, which lets you discover and use community resources including styles, models, 3D models, projects, and processing scripts directly from QGIS.

발표 제목 (Title): Impactful Data: International cooperation to increase the value of open-source data & software including in hazard scenarios
초록 (Abstract): Open-source geospatial data and Overture Maps can generate detailed dwelling, transport, and service models. Case studies from Australia, New Zealand, Fiji, and Spain demonstrate applications for disaster risk reduction.

발표 제목 (Title): Geoconnex: Standardizing Water Data in the United States through a Unified Graph Database
초록 (Abstract): Geoconnex links hydrologic data across many government agencies in the United States as a knowledge graph, published in accordance with W3C Spatial Data on the Web best practices.

발표 제목 (Title): From Projects to Products: Operating Open Geospatial Data as a Regional Public Good in the Pacific
초록 (Abstract): A practical look at how the Pacific Community is shifting from short-term geospatial projects to sustainable, open data products through shared standards, regional governance, and coordinated stewardship.

발표 제목 (Title): Every building on Earth
초록 (Abstract): We present an open, global, building-level resolution, reproducible and dynamic exposure model for applications in natural hazard risk estimation, resilience planning, disaster recovery, and humanitarian tasks.

발표 제목 (Title): GeoServer Update
초록 (Abstract): GeoServer is a web service for publishing your geospatial data using industry standards for vector, raster and mapping, as well as batch or on-the-fly data processing.

발표 제목 (Title): Pacific Ocean Portal 2.0
초록 (Abstract): Pacific Ocean Portal 2.0 is an open-source platform enabling seamless access to ocean data, advanced GIS-based data management, and real-time visualization for Pacific Island countries.

발표 제목 (Title): Bridging Cloud and Community: AWS AI Services Meet Open Source Geospatial Tools
초록 (Abstract): This session showcases architectural patterns for leveraging cloud AI services with open source geospatial tools, alongside case studies demonstrating how organizations use this combination.

발표 제목 (Title): The state of GeoPlegma
초록 (Abstract): This session provides an overview of the GeoPlegma project, how it evolved the past year and what is in store for the next.

발표 제목 (Title): Standardizing Geospatial Time Series Access with OGC API EDR and RDF Linked Data Standards
초록 (Abstract): OGC API Environmental Data Retrieval is a powerful new API standard for accessing time series data about geospatial areas, integrated with RDF vocabularies and JSON-LD.

발표 제목 (Title): gitRmap / "Guitar Map" - Easy Maps for Git users
초록 (Abstract): GIS is amazing, but there are many people who would like to create a map but don't know GIS. gitRmap is an easy way of creating a simple map for people who know a little bit of Git.

발표 제목 (Title): The state of MapLibre: ecosystem update
초록 (Abstract): Learn of all that is new in MapLibre - changes to the web map renderer, the native, the Martin tile server, and numerous other changes including the short intro into MLT - new tile format.

발표 제목 (Title): Developing an ocean renewable energy platform with FOSS4G
초록 (Abstract): This session explores using FOSS4G in building a comprehensive ocean renewable energy platform to support the global push for Net Zero.

발표 제목 (Title): Mapping the World, Empowering People with QField
초록 (Abstract): Discover all QField new features and Explore how QField empowers people to map and understand the world—supporting daily tasks, global challenges, and the UN SDGs.

발표 제목 (Title): Maplibreum: like Folium - but based on Maplibre
초록 (Abstract): Maplibreum: framework that makes the creation of web maps quite easy in a Python environment, similar to Folium but using MapLibre instead of Leaflet.

발표 제목 (Title): Teaching AI to Contribute to Open Source: Lessons from MapLibre Agent Skills
초록 (Abstract): This talk shares lessons from building MapLibre Agent Skills: an open, eval-tested knowledge base that corrects AI hallucination in MapLibre implementations.

발표 제목 (Title): QGIS in Your Language
초록 (Abstract): In 2024, we launched a Japanese QGIS platform now reaching 20,000 monthly users. We share our approach and how to replicate it in your language.

발표 제목 (Title): End-to-End Satellite Data Pipeline: Airflow Orchestration, Zarr Storage, and LandTrendr Analysis
초록 (Abstract): Apache Airflow manages tasks in a data pipeline from data ingestion and preprocessing to storage in ZARR format for multidimensional satellite imagery.

발표 제목 (Title): A Japanese Company's Journey in Building the QGIS Community
초록 (Abstract): Based on MIERUNE's experience in Japan, this presentation shares practical insights into how companies can support and extend QGIS through user support, knowledge sharing, and plugin development.

발표 제목 (Title): State of libCartoSym / libCSCQL2 / libDE9IM
초록 (Abstract): Update on the FOSS libCartoSym, libCSCQL2 and libDE9IM implementing the candidate OGC Cartographic Symbology 2.0 Standard, Common Query Language (CQL2) and Simple Features.

발표 제목 (Title): From Data to Insights: Decision-Support tool application with the Goa Agriculture Department
초록 (Abstract): A decision support tool provides access to machine learning (ML) features, generating insights revealing core predictors behind key outcomes in agriculture.

발표 제목 (Title): Running pygeoapi Cloud Native at Scale
초록 (Abstract): This session will explain best practices for deploying pygeoapi and scaling it within a cloud native, containerized, and horizontally scalable deployment.

발표 제목 (Title): Operating Maritime AIS at Enterprise Scale with GeoServer
초록 (Abstract): This presentation describes a cloud-based approach to managing large-scale maritime data, enabling near real-time visualization alongside historical analysis.

발표 제목 (Title): Quality Control Leveraging the Characteristics of Proprietary and Open-Source GIS
초록 (Abstract): This presentation compares the outcomes of ArcGIS and QGIS topology validation tools, analyzes the practical issues stemming from their differences, and proposes potential solutions.

발표 제목 (Title): Networking Modelling: A case for Somaliland sub-transmission and distribution investment plan
초록 (Abstract): Somaliland's electricity network lacks integration. Modeling and simulations analyzed current and future network scenarios, identifying growth constraints and network inefficiencies.

발표 제목 (Title): Voxelization. Cubing 3D Space for Machine.
초록 (Abstract): Voxelizer, which produces 3D grid data—voxels—from 2D/3D spatial information raw data.

발표 제목 (Title): Maintaining a small research tool: Experiences from the R package seg
초록 (Abstract): This presentation introduces the R package seg developed nearly fifteen years ago and shares the difficulties encountered while developing and maintaining a small academic package.

발표 제목 (Title): Tokyo Last Train Map: Visualizing 'When You Can't Get Home' with Open Data from 17 Rail Operators
초록 (Abstract): An interactive web application that visualizes Tokyo's last train network fading away over time in a firework-like radial display, combining ODPT public transit open data from 17 rail operators.

발표 제목 (Title): From Manual to AI: Building a Custom QGIS Plugin for Automated Tree Counting and Infrastructure Detection
초록 (Abstract): A custom QGIS plugin integrating YOLOv8 and DeepLabV3+ to automate palm oil tree counting, road, and drainage detection from massive drone orthophotos in precision agriculture.

발표 제목 (Title): Near-real-time monitoring of disaster damage on individual households
초록 (Abstract): This project utilizes deep learning and high-resolution satellite imagery to monitor post-disaster housing destruction in near-real time to support humanitarian aid prioritization.

발표 제목 (Title): Geospatial ES|QL in Elasticsearch
초록 (Abstract): ES|QL is a powerful new declarative query language for Elasticsearch, opening the door to PostGIS-like ease of use for Geospatial querying and analytics.

발표 제목 (Title): GeoNode: Use Cases & Custom Applications
초록 (Abstract): A gallery of GeoNode projects and use cases showcasing GeoNode's versatility for building secured geodata catalogs and web mapping services, from local administrations to global institutions.

발표 제목 (Title): Reshaping knowledge boundaries in an age of generative-AI
초록 (Abstract): This talk summarizes findings from interviews with free and open source software community members, investigating their views, attitudes and engagement with recent advancement of generative-AI.

발표 제목 (Title): Explore open-source tools to create digital urban models for MapStore
초록 (Abstract): The presentation describes processes and opensource tools employed to build and consume digital models for urban environments including 3D data visualizations for the MapStore WebGIS framework.

발표 제목 (Title): Multimodal AI-based Platform for Damage Assessment, Prediction, and Maintenance of Essential Buildings and Infrastructures in Climate Change
초록 (Abstract): We present an integrated multi-modal AI platform designed to transition infrastructure maintenance from 'aging-focused' to 'climate-proactive' using GIS-based frameworks.

발표 제목 (Title): Strengthening Community Resilience in Dili Through Integrated Waste Mapping, Mobile-Based Reporting, and Drone-Assisted Early Warning
초록 (Abstract): This project integrates participatory mapping using OpenStreetMap, real-time community reporting through Ushahidi, and drone mapping to monitor waste hotspots and support early warning in Dili, Timor-Leste.

발표 제목 (Title): Breaking the Barriers: Using Generative AI for Global Geospatial Data Accessibility
초록 (Abstract): This presentation highlights 'invisible walls' in geospatial data access due to language and local technical barriers, and explores how Generative AI can bridge these gaps.

발표 제목 (Title): OSGeo and OGC MoU update
초록 (Abstract): In 2022, OSGeo and OGC signed a new Memorandum of Understanding (MoU). This presentation will provide an update on collaboration, reference implementations, code sprints, and future plans.

발표 제목 (Title): Where next for OSGeo?
초록 (Abstract): A non-technical talk in regards to the structure of OSGeo, its members, local chapters, and financing. The work of OSGeo:UK, the prospect of OSGeo Europe, and plans for FOSS4G 2027 in Bristol.

발표 제목 (Title): Pedestrian Trajectory Mapping with MapLibre and OpenCV from Smartphone Videos
초록 (Abstract): A simple pipeline to extract pedestrian trajectories from smartphone videos and draw them on map in urban spaces using MapLibre and OpenCV.

발표 제목 (Title): A new way of mapping with Discrete Global Grid Reference System
초록 (Abstract): DGGRS divides the Earth's sphere into regular zones with unique identifiers, resolving the distortion and reprojection problems of traditional flat maps.

발표 제목 (Title): OGC/ISO standards for CRS: a look back and a look ahead
초록 (Abstract): An history of CRS at OGC: how WKT and abstract model evolved in parallel, and a look ahead at how OGC handles JSON encoding in future standards.

발표 제목 (Title): Open Geo Embeddings: Models, Representations, and Systems
초록 (Abstract): This talk introduces a clear framework and compares GeoAI embedding approaches like Clay and TESSERA to help practitioners understand and apply geospatial embeddings in real-world workflows.

발표 제목 (Title): Web-Based High-Performance Traffic Simulator: Advancing an Integrated Interaction Platform for Urban Planning Decision-Making
초록 (Abstract): A traffic simulation platform enhanced for real-world urban planning, moving beyond visualization toward immediate, high-performance deployment in professional environments.

발표 제목 (Title): Storing your Satellite in a DGGS
초록 (Abstract): DGGS gaining popularity in the GeoAI space. We'll look at pros and cons of storing vector and raster data in couple of indexing algorithms.

발표 제목 (Title): Multistore: An S3-compliant data distribution API
초록 (Abstract): Source Cooperative's data proxy lets users access open datasets through S3-compatible tools. We rebuilt it from scratch as Multistore, an open source S3 gateway designed to be reusable across the ecosystem.

발표 제목 (Title): State of GRASS
초록 (Abstract): GRASS, Geographic Resources Analysis Support System, is a powerful engine for geospatial processing and analysis. This talk delivers the latest GRASS update and community developments.

발표 제목 (Title): Automated Slope Estimation of Retaining Walls Using Drone Photogrammetry Point Clouds
초록 (Abstract): This study proposes an automated slope estimation method using cross-sectional profiles derived from large-scale point cloud data for the safety inspection and maintenance of retaining walls.

발표 제목 (Title): Supporting precision farming with GeoServer: past experiences and way forward
초록 (Abstract): This presentation highlights how GeoSolutions leverages cloud infrastructure and geospatial technologies to enable precision farming at scale using GeoServer deployment strategies.

발표 제목 (Title): The metadata problem
초록 (Abstract): In this talk, I'll try to explain the metadata problem in geospatial data and why things like STAC are useful but cannot always solve your problem.

발표 제목 (Title): Best Practises for Consuming OGC API Data
초록 (Abstract): This talk addresses some common challenges users face when consuming data from OGC API, mapping these issues to best practices for data consumers and publishers.

발표 제목 (Title): The Pacific Geospatial Women Network
초록 (Abstract): To provide geospatial mapping training and raise awareness on the use of geospatial tools to empower Pacific Women in mapping for community development and decision-making.

발표 제목 (Title): Open-sourcing the ivory tower: removing barriers between scientific modelling and communities
초록 (Abstract): Open-source software was used to develop water flow and tracing models of Te Awarua o Porirua (Porirua Harbour), New Zealand, with an open-source dashboard for community interpretation.

발표 제목 (Title): Open Schools Kenya
초록 (Abstract): Open Schools Kenya has put all schools on the map using OpenStreetMap.

발표 제목 (Title): When Maps Are Not Enough: Exploring 'Spatial Narrative Interfaces' for Geospatial Insight
초록 (Abstract): This work explores how geospatial systems can move beyond map-centric interfaces by transforming complex GIS data into interpretable visual narratives.

발표 제목 (Title): Caring for a Living Park: An Open-Source Geospatial System Inspired by Field Experience (Cerro Kavaju, Paraguay)
초록 (Abstract): A real-world case from Paraguay showing how a combination of open-source geospatial tools supports biodiversity monitoring, trail management, wildlife tracking, and conservation.

발표 제목 (Title): Less to Think About: Bridging the Usability Gap in Geospatial Platforms
초록 (Abstract): Through two real-world platforms, this session explores how to turn powerful open-source spatial tools into decisions anyone can act on — by giving users less to think about.

발표 제목 (Title): Rise of the Machines, Rise of the Workers
초록 (Abstract): The fourth wave of the industrial revolution has been seen by many as a very bad idea. This talk explores compelling parallels and lessons from good old fashioned organised labour.

발표 제목 (Title): What's going on? An introduction to diagnosing PostgreSQL systems.
초록 (Abstract): An introduction to looking at operating system and PostgreSQL database system stats to start understanding what the system is doing.

발표 제목 (Title): Integrating Indigenous Knowledge and Open-Source GIS for Climate Resilience in Fiji
초록 (Abstract): This lightning talk shares how the SHAPE-CAR project in Fiji uses open-source GIS tools to support community-led climate resilience planning.

발표 제목 (Title): Ten Years of PoliMappers: Lessons from a Student-Led Open Mapping Community
초록 (Abstract): PoliMappers reflect on a decade of student-led open mapping at Politecnico di Milano, sharing lessons on community sustainability and FOSS4G academic integration.

발표 제목 (Title): ESGF Next Generation
초록 (Abstract): The Earth System Grid Federation (ESGF) new architecture introduces STAC catalogues, Kerchunk-enabled access, and an event-driven search system synchronising two discovery nodes.

발표 제목 (Title): Rendering National Climate Data in the Browser: WebGL Custom Shaders with MapLibre GL JS
초록 (Abstract): We present maplibre-gl-shader-layer, an open source TypeScript library enabling custom WebGL shaders on MapLibre GL JS, demonstrated through Météo France climate datasets.

발표 제목 (Title): From Fragile to Robust: Making PL/pgSQL Safer with plpgsql_check
초록 (Abstract): plpgsql_check is an open-source static analysis extension for PostgreSQL that helps catch many issues before they become production problems.

발표 제목 (Title): Japanese Map Culture: Inheritance through FOSS4G Technology
초록 (Abstract): Japanese map culture has evolved through a pursuit of intuitive map designs as sophisticated infographics. We are redefining this cultural legacy within the digital space using FOSS4G technology.

발표 제목 (Title): From Boring XML to 3D Tiles: Building a Geological Borehole Viewer with CesiumJS
초록 (Abstract): We present a pipeline transforming 190,000+ Japanese geological borehole records into interactive CesiumJS 3D Tiles using Implicit Tiling with glTF metadata extensions.

발표 제목 (Title): GeoReports Web Application
초록 (Abstract): GeoReports is a java servlet web application that provides a powerful tool for creating a geographically rich PDF Report containing a series of predefined pages relating to a location of interest.

발표 제목 (Title): TerriaJS applications
초록 (Abstract): This demonstration showcases TerriaJS's data visualisation capabilities through real-world deployments including satellite imagery and digital twins, all running open-source in the browser.

발표 제목 (Title): Lessons from Running GeoServer at Scale
초록 (Abstract): This talk presents a practical playbook for taking GeoServer to production, covering performance tuning, data preparation, caching strategies, and operational controls.

발표 제목 (Title): Hiroshima "Atomic Bomb Drawings" Visualization Project
초록 (Abstract): An 'Atomic Bomb Drawings' project in which Hiroshima high school students create paintings based on survivors' testimonies, presented as an interactive map-based digital archive on Re:Earth.

발표 제목 (Title): CDSE: Europe's Sovereign Infrastructure for Open Earth Observation
초록 (Abstract): The Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem gives every user free access to Europe's Earth observation archive through cloud-native APIs. We showcase how sovereign EU infrastructure and open standards turn this archive into a foundation for geospatial AI.

발표 제목 (Title): A New Approach to MapLibre Style Editing
초록 (Abstract): Mapstrata is a visual editor for MapLibre styles that makes collaboration possible: spec validation, variant support, and a project format built for git.

발표 제목 (Title): Open Standards and Tools to Accelerate Global Crisis Response
초록 (Abstract): The IFRC launched the Global Crisis Data Bank (Montandon), the world's largest repository of natural hazard and impact data. This talk covers how we're building a harmonized data repository using open standards like STAC.

발표 제목 (Title): Breaking the Browser's Limit: High-Performance Spatial Analytics with GeoArrow & DuckDB
초록 (Abstract): A high-performance, serverless spatial analytics framework using GeoArrow, DuckDB-Wasm, and Parquet, achieving a 10x-50x performance boost over row-based GeoJSON.

발표 제목 (Title): Iwfgara: Visualizing Numerical Weather Prediction Data in an Open Source Web-based 3D GIS
초록 (Abstract): Iwfgara is an open-source web-based 3D GIS platform for visualizing numerical weather prediction data and enabling interactive exploration of atmospheric phenomena.

발표 제목 (Title): TREACOM - terrain relief emphasized and color muted image map
초록 (Abstract): A patented image processing method designed as a replacement for plan drawings, improving interpretability of UAV ortho images through terrain relief emphasis and color reduction.

발표 제목 (Title): One Project, All Views: QGIS Map Themes
초록 (Abstract): Mastering QGIS Map Themes streamlines cartographic workflows, automates Atlas production and enhances field data collection using Mergin Maps and QField.

발표 제목 (Title): From Chaos to Confidence: Practical DataOps with COG Optimization and Great Expectations for National-Scale Agriculture
초록 (Abstract): GISTDA's Dragonfly project lessons on national-scale agricultural monitoring using COG performance optimization and Great Expectations automated quality gates.

발표 제목 (Title): Beyond Shapefile: A Taxonomy of Modern Geospatial Data Formats
초록 (Abstract): This talk provides a structured overview of formats including MVT, MLT, 3D Tiles, PMTiles, FlatGeobuf, and GeoParquet, explaining their core concepts, trade-offs, and how to combine them.

발표 제목 (Title): Using Building Exposure Taxonomies in HOT Workflows
초록 (Abstract): We share how the Open Exposure Taxonomy integrates several open data taxonomies and improves the quality of data for disaster risk.

발표 제목 (Title): Smarter Geospatial Management: A Collaborative Web Client for National Spatial Data
초록 (Abstract): We present the Geonorge.Forvaltning.Client, a web-based GIS interface for the collaborative maintenance of Norway's national map data.

발표 제목 (Title): Offline-First Geospatial Architecture for Tree-Level Analysis Using FOSS4G Pipelines
초록 (Abstract): This talk presents an offline-first geospatial architecture integrating photogrammetry, point cloud processing, and tree-level analysis using FOSS4G.

발표 제목 (Title): Modernizing Earth Observation Access: The GEODES Shift to Open Source and Cloud-Optimized Architectures
초록 (Abstract): Our experience with the migration of GEODES (CNES Earth observation catalog) from proprietary systems to an Open Source, cloud-optimized architecture.

발표 제목 (Title): National Map Agent: An Open Geospatial Architecture for Knowledge Graph-Driven GeoAI
초록 (Abstract): This presentation introduces a National Map Agent integrating open geospatial standards, knowledge graphs, and GraphRAG to enable intelligent, standards-aware mapping workflows.

발표 제목 (Title): Mapping Peace: A GIS-Based Storytelling Platform for Global Peace Education from Hiroshima [2]
초록 (Abstract): This research develops interactive peace education platforms integrating GIS with storytelling functions, mapping all atomic bomb-related sites within five kilometers of Hiroshima's hypocenter on Re:Earth.

발표 제목 (Title): From Binary to Web Maps: Teaching GIS Programming in the Kartoza Internship
초록 (Abstract): This talk shares stories from running the Kartoza internship remotely, guiding university students from basic computer science concepts to building simple web GIS applications with Python and Django.

발표 제목 (Title): Beyond the Pixels: A PM's Perspective on "Data Transition" – Transforming Satellite Imagery into Actionable Disaster Solutions
초록 (Abstract): This presentation introduces the 'Data Transition' framework, using FOSS4G pipelines to transform satellite imagery into actionable disaster solutions.

발표 제목 (Title): GIS-based Crop Monitoring using Satellite and Weather Data: A Case Study of Kolhapur
초록 (Abstract): This study demonstrates the integration of satellite imagery and weather data for crop monitoring in Kolhapur using open-source GIS tools including QGIS, NDVI, and Remote Sensing.

발표 제목 (Title): Construction of a Geospatial Digital Archive of the Fukui Air Raid History
초록 (Abstract): This presentation introduces the Fukui Air Raid Digital Archive, a community-based project using open-source GIS to map war memories, historical records, and disaster impacts.

발표 제목 (Title): Working with PostgreSQL when your DBA is not around
초록 (Abstract): This conference presentation provides a comprehensive overview of the world's most powerful open-source database for non-DBAs when application performance is at stake.

발표 제목 (Title): Applying OSS "Ouranos GEX": Lessons from PoC and the Path to Java-Based Development
초록 (Abstract): We conducted a PoC using OSS 'Ouranos GEX' in our high-speed spatiotemporal data management technology and discuss the development of the Java-based OSS.

발표 제목 (Title): Z7 Explorer — Why IGEO7 May Succeed H3 as the Standard Hexagonal DGGS
초록 (Abstract): We present Z7 Explorer, a web application that computes IGEO7/Z7 grid indexes entirely client-side. We demonstrate why IGEO7 addresses fundamental limitations of H3 and conventional coordinate systems.

발표 제목 (Title): SedonaDB: Why Yet Another Geospatial Database Engine?
초록 (Abstract): SedonaDB is an open-source single-node analytical database engine for GIS. This talk will provide an overview of the current FOSS4G database landscape and explain why SedonaDB matters.

발표 제목 (Title): State of GeoNode
초록 (Abstract): This presentation will introduce the attendees to GeoNode's new capabilities, summarizing new features added in the last release and a glimpse of what's planned.

발표 제목 (Title): PostgreSQL Catalogs Explained: Metadata, Introspection, and Insights
초록 (Abstract): PostgreSQL's system catalogs are at the heart of how the database organizes and manages information. A solid understanding of catalogs helps developers and DBAs write powerful introspection queries.

발표 제목 (Title): Hillshading for Real-time Lighting
초록 (Abstract): This talk presents how we implemented a decoupled terrain normal generation approach for real-time, high-performance rendering to support Navara system's dynamic day-night cycle.

발표 제목 (Title): QGIS Web Client (QWC) - project status and new developments
초록 (Abstract): QGIS Web Client (QWC) is a modular next generation responsive web client for QGIS Server, built with ReactJS and OpenLayers. This presentation gives a short introduction and presents new developments.

발표 제목 (Title): From Legacy Data to National Standards: Preparing a Brazilian City for Federal Interoperability with FOSS4G
초록 (Abstract): Caucaia's story reveals how transitioning from fragmented files to an open spatial database using PostGIS and QGIS is transforming urban management toward the SINTER framework.

발표 제목 (Title): Project Support at OSGeo
초록 (Abstract): Learn how project support works at the Open Source Geospatial Foundation, the initial vision of the 'incubation committee', and what is being setup as a replacement.

발표 제목 (Title): The Power of Local Connections for Social Impact in a Technocratic World: Experiences from HOT
초록 (Abstract): Drawing on HOT's experiences from around the world, this talk shows how FOSS tools paired with collaboration and local engagement empower communities to become local changemakers.

발표 제목 (Title): Contributing to Landslide Disaster Prevention Measures in the Noto Region Using Open Source Software
초록 (Abstract): The 2024 Noto Peninsula Earthquake triggered landslides. Using open geospatial data, the authors identified 'hidden landslides' and developed a web platform to visualize topographic changes.

발표 제목 (Title): From GeoTIFF to Kriging: A Fully Open-Source Remote Sensing Workflow
초록 (Abstract): This talk presents a fully open-source workflow for geospatial modeling of satellite-derived chlorophyll-a data using QGIS, GDAL, and R, with kriging interpolation.

발표 제목 (Title): Using Lonboard for interactive STAC, COG, and Zarr visualization from Python
초록 (Abstract): Lonboard is the fastest, most capable Python library for interactive geospatial data visualization. This demonstration will show how to visualize STAC, COG, and Zarr in Lonboard.

발표 제목 (Title): Idle-Aware Geo-Processing Scheduler: Auto-Scaling Workers for Cloud-Native Geospatial Processing
초록 (Abstract): An idle-aware geospatial processing scheduler that auto-scales workers based on queued workloads for scalable geospatial data processing pipelines.

발표 제목 (Title): Vector tiles and GeoServer: dynamic vector tiles server, XYZ services, and base maps
초록 (Abstract): An in-depth look at GeoServer's support for Mapbox Vector Tiles, covering recent enhancements, flexible styling mechanisms, and performance optimization techniques.

발표 제목 (Title): Solar Potential Analysis on Japan's PLATEAU 3D City Model: A Visual ETL Workflow
초록 (Abstract): This talk walks through a solar potential analysis workflow on PLATEAU data: CityGML challenges, the transformation pipeline, and turning a one-off analysis into a reusable spatial workflow.

발표 제목 (Title): WoSIS: Global soil information service powered by open source tools.
초록 (Abstract): WoSIS is a global soil information service built on PostgreSQL/PostGIS, GraphQL and OGC services, covering the full cycle from ingestion to dissemination.

발표 제목 (Title): GeoAI for Social Impact: Open-Source Flood Risk Mapping and Early Warning Systems in Informal Settlements of South Africa
초록 (Abstract): Open-source geospatial tools and GeoAI are used to map flood risk and support early warning systems in informal settlements using Sentinel-2 data and machine learning.

발표 제목 (Title): City-scale imagery generation using a handful of cheap consumer drones
초록 (Abstract): At HOTOSM we have been refining workflows alongside OpenDroneMap to process areas of <100 km² captured using DJI Mini series drones with Kubernetes-native processing pipelines.

발표 제목 (Title): Introducing the Climate Action Navigator
초록 (Abstract): Introducing the Climate Action Navigator, a FOSS4G website containing high-resolution spatial indicators of actionable insights to support climate action.

발표 제목 (Title): OpenStreetMap-Driven Flood Susceptibility Modeling Using GIS with Multi-Criteria Decision Analysis
초록 (Abstract): This study develops a GIS-based flood susceptibility model for Nepal's Sunkoshi Basin integrating OpenStreetMap-derived hydrography within an MCDA framework.

발표 제목 (Title): pycsw project status
초록 (Abstract): pycsw project status presentation. Come and find out the latest news on the project as well as future plans, and how to get involved!

발표 제목 (Title): The Human Lens in a Machine-Mapped World
초록 (Abstract): Beyond LiDAR and automated sensors, human photography captures the 'why' of a place. This talk draws inspiration from Panoramio and Flickr, questioning whether human-captured imagery remains a vital layer for modern mapping.

발표 제목 (Title): MAPME Initiative: Open Geospatial Ressources for Development Impact
초록 (Abstract): MAPME is a community-driven initiative promoting access to open GIS resources for planning, monitoring, and evaluation in international development.

발표 제목 (Title): GeoNode usage in Brazil: State of art, challenges, and business opportunities
초록 (Abstract): This work aims to discuss, based on real data, a general scenario regarding the current use of GeoNode in Brazil.

발표 제목 (Title): Streetview Image Inpainting with Image-Edit Diffusion Models
초록 (Abstract): This talk shows how using ComfyUI and the Qwen Image model to build a 'magic eraser' for high-res street imagery using AI-driven masks.

발표 제목 (Title): Wave-like Propagation Heatmap from Discrete Data Using Geospatial Indexing Methods
초록 (Abstract): To transform discrete geospatial data into an insightful heatmap, this proposal focuses on the selection of geospatial indexing methods with traversal functionality and wave-like propagation.

발표 제목 (Title): Open Vector Tiles for the Actual Vegetation Map 2024 and Launching the Satellite-based Vegetation map 2030
초록 (Abstract): This presentation introduces the public release of vector tile data for the Actual Vegetation Map 2024 and the launch of the Satellite-based Vegetation map 2030 for biodiversity applications.

발표 제목 (Title): What is the optimal resolution of a DGGS for forest cover mapping and monitoring?
초록 (Abstract): Remote sensing-based biophysical indicators such as leaf area index are integrated in a Discrete Global Grid System (DGGS) for forest monitoring in Catalonia.

발표 제목 (Title): OGC APIs with GeoServer 3: implementation, availability and next steps
초록 (Abstract): Overview of OGC APIs implementation in GeoServer. OGC APIs offer a modern, modular, RESTful geospatial services using JSON and extensible building blocks.

발표 제목 (Title): Geospatial and Multi-Criteria Decision Analysis of Green Infrastructure for Urban Equity and Resilience: Padua, Italy
초록 (Abstract): Research examining how rooftop greening and urban agroecology can support equitable, healthy, climate-resilient urban development through GIS analysis.

발표 제목 (Title): Open Source Access Options for NASA-ISRO Synthetic Aperture Radar (NISAR) Mission Data
초록 (Abstract): The NISAR mission launched in July 2025. This talk presents a range of open source tools available for accessing and transforming L-band data from the mission.

발표 제목 (Title): Open Drone Mapping for Empowerment
초록 (Abstract): Open drone technology and collaborative platforms improve geospatial data collection using Drone Tasking Manager, OpenDroneMap, and OpenStreetMap.

발표 제목 (Title): 50 Lines of Python: Neighborhood DNA from Overture Maps Places
초록 (Abstract): Overture Maps Places offers 53 million POIs. In 50 lines of Python and DuckDB, I turn raw Overture places into a visual neighborhood typology.

발표 제목 (Title): Beyond the Demo: How Re:Earth Is Being Deployed in Government GIS
초록 (Abstract): This talk reports from the field: how Japanese government agencies are using Re:Earth Visualizer and CMS to build public data portals and run citizen participation programs.

발표 제목 (Title): Speeding up earthwork volume calculation using the point elevation method
초록 (Abstract): In earth volume calculation using the spot level method, computational speed was improved by adopting image-based rasterization for the inside/outside determination of the calculation area.

발표 제목 (Title): Waystones: Bridging the Deployment Gap for Authoritative OGC API Services
초록 (Abstract): Waystones is an open-source tool for designing geospatial data models and deploying production-ready OGC APIs by automating the configuration of pygeoapi and QGIS Server.

발표 제목 (Title): Web-Based Urban Thermal Fluid Simulation System Using 3D City Model
초록 (Abstract): We developed a system that utilizes the open-source 3D city model 'PLATEAU' to enable simple thermal fluid simulations on a web application for urban planning.

발표 제목 (Title): A cultural database for down to earth users: open source maps and media in Indigenous Australia
초록 (Abstract): This talk explores the technology stack and design process behind a visual cultural database for Indigenous organisations in Australia using open source geospatial tools.

발표 제목 (Title): Developing a QGIS Plugin for Urban Structure Evaluation
초록 (Abstract): This presentation introduces a QGIS plugin developed under Japan's Project PLATEAU to help municipal staff calculate and visualize urban structure evaluation indicators.

발표 제목 (Title): State of MapStore
초록 (Abstract): MapStore is an open-source webgis built on React and Redux to create and share maps, dashboards, and geostories. It is mobile-ready and supports OpenLayers, Leaflet, and Cesium.

발표 제목 (Title): From Cloud to GPU: Inside the Modern Vector Tile Rendering Pipeline
초록 (Abstract): This talk walks through the full pipeline from cloud storage to browser GPU: accessing PMTiles, decoding MVT and MLT, and rendering on the GPU with future directions like WebGPU.

발표 제목 (Title): Architecture design and API development for geospatial backend in Large-Scale forest and land monitoring platforms
초록 (Abstract): Architecture design use case on forest and land monitoring platform (LANDX) by GISTDA Thailand, dealing with large geospatial data and big geospatial queries.

발표 제목 (Title): Big Data Transportation Planning Decision Support Using an Open-Source WebGIS Digital Twin
초록 (Abstract): A WebGIS-based digital twin platform integrating open-source geospatial technologies and urban mobility data to support data-driven transportation planning.

발표 제목 (Title): Development Planning of a Web Map Application for "Watashitachi no Hiroshima" Textbook
초록 (Abstract): This presentation introduces a development plan for a web-based map application for the supplementary social studies textbook 'Watashitachi no Hiroshima' used in Hiroshima elementary schools.

발표 제목 (Title): Bridging the Gap: Practical Spatial Partitioning of GeoParquet in an Evolving Ecosystem
초록 (Abstract): We built a custom spatial indexing pipeline using Dagster and GeoPandas for GeoParquet 1.1 while waiting for native tools to fully mature.

발표 제목 (Title): Mastering Security with GeoServer, GeoFence, and OpenID
초록 (Abstract): This presentation introduces GeoServer's authentication and authorization subsystems, including advanced rule-based access control with GeoFence and flexible integration options.

발표 제목 (Title): Developing Rendering Effect Extensions as a GIS Beginner
초록 (Abstract): This talk presents the implementation of Object-Selective Post Effects (Outline/Bloom) in a GIS-oriented rendering system.

발표 제목 (Title): Noodles.gl: A visual programming language for animation, geospatial and the web
초록 (Abstract): Noodles.gl is an open-source visual programming environment simplifying the creation of high-performance geospatial animations by integrating Deck.gl and MapLibre into a reactive, node-based workflow.

발표 제목 (Title): Web-Based High-Performance Traffic Simulator [2]
초록 (Abstract): A traffic simulation platform enhanced for real-world urban planning, demonstrating technical maturity as a practical decision-support tool.

발표 제목 (Title): Machine Learning-Driven Detection and Suitability Assessment of Rooftop Solar Photovoltaic Installations Using Satellite Imagery
초록 (Abstract): A machine learning framework leveraging satellite imagery to automate the detection, mapping, and suitability assessment of rooftops for solar photovoltaic (PV) installations.

발표 제목 (Title): Seamlessly Compare Maps on QGIS with the QMapCompare Plugin
초록 (Abstract): QMapCompare solves the problem of comparing differences between basemaps or datasets in QGIS by bringing interactive map comparison into QGIS.

발표 제목 (Title): Efficient pixel-scale upstream covariate computation for environmental machine learning
초록 (Abstract): An efficient flow-accumulation-based method bypassing per-pixel delineation, achieving orders-of-magnitude speedups for hydrological ML, demonstrated through a countrywide Random Forest nitrogen prediction.

발표 제목 (Title): Making Urban Data Explorable: 3D, GeoServer, and OSS
초록 (Abstract): A lightning talk showing how 3D data helps urban planning, covering key datasets and how GeoServer publishes them with use cases for Cross-sections, Visibility, and 2D-3D Linking.

발표 제목 (Title): Rendering Massive Moving Points at 60fps on CesiumJS: Real-Time Dynamic Vector Rendering with GPU Textures
초록 (Abstract): Using Vertex Texture Fetch (VTF) to store position data in GPU textures, enabling real-time updates without geometry reconstruction for satellite trajectory monitoring.

발표 제목 (Title): Cognitive Motion Design Redefining Interaction in map applications: Use case for Smart Agriculture
초록 (Abstract): 'Cognitive Motion' leverages Motion UI and perceptive psychology to simplify complex Smart Agriculture data, reducing cognitive load and preventing spatial disorientation.

발표 제목 (Title): Turning Statistics into Maps with UNICEF's Open Source Geospatial Solutions
초록 (Abstract): UNICEF's open-source stack - GeoRepo, GeoSight, and SDMXConnector - enabling seamless integration of SDMX data with harmonized boundaries for map-ready insights.

발표 제목 (Title): i.hyper: processing hyperspectral imagery in GRASS
초록 (Abstract): i.hyper is a comprehensive hyperspectral processing addon for GRASS covering import, metadata handling, atmospheric correction, preprocessing, spectral resampling, indices, and more.

발표 제목 (Title): Project Update (GeoNode-k8s)
초록 (Abstract): The geonode-k8s chart is production-grade, community-driven solution for deploying GeoNode 4.x and 5 on Kubernetes.

발표 제목 (Title): GeoNetwork 5: reimagining the Spatial Data Catalog for the future
초록 (Abstract): A development update from the latest version of GeoNetwork, as a 20-year-old project prepares for the challenges of the next decade.

발표 제목 (Title): Point Cloud PNG: Efficient Web-Based Distribution of Large-Scale Point Cloud Data via Image Encoding
초록 (Abstract): Point Cloud PNG is a file format for publishing two- or three-dimensional positional data using PNG/WebP with lossless compression, encoding numerical data as pixels.

발표 제목 (Title): Mapping Fiber Without Operator Data: Evidence-Based Connectivity Indicators
초록 (Abstract): An evidence-based methodology to assess fiber presence and connectability using Overturemaps, network measurements, and routing constraints, explicitly accounting for uncertainty.

발표 제목 (Title): The State of OGC SensorThings API
초록 (Abstract): An update on the OGC SensorThings API v2.0, the open source servers and clients available today, and real-world geospatial IoT use cases across sectors.

발표 제목 (Title): Building Agents for Open Data Research at Overture
초록 (Abstract): Overture Maps Foundation is experimenting with Large Language Models and agents to integrate agents for open data discovery and research into Overture's pipeline.

발표 제목 (Title): Current Status of ChOWDER: A Web-based Scalable Display for Ultra-High Resolution Web3DGIS
초록 (Abstract): ChOWDER is an open-source tiled display system that creates large pixel spaces via distributed web rendering, with a new feature for GIS overlay visualization of climate simulation results.

발표 제목 (Title): Reproducibility in geospatial research: a case study.
초록 (Abstract): This talk highlights challenges in deep learning reproducibility and presents practical strategies, tools, and documentation practices for transparent, repeatable experiments using open-source technologies.

발표 제목 (Title): From Map Layers to Knowledge Models: Extending Open GIS
초록 (Abstract): This talk introduces a practical extension that adds relational modeling to existing QGIS and PostGIS workflows, improving transparency and decision support in complex earthquake-prone disaster scenarios in Japan.

발표 제목 (Title): Cartographic Patterns: Comparing Multimodal Transport Systems in AMS and BLR
초록 (Abstract): A cartographic comparison of the transport infrastructure in two dissimilar cities utilizing space-time cubes and the cities' transport index to identify gaps.

발표 제목 (Title): Testing PLATEAU Pipelines in Re:Earth Flow When Topology Doesn't Survive
초록 (Abstract): Testing a CityGML-tileset conversion pipeline. We show how statistical + raster-based testing in Re:Earth flow catches bugs in engine development.

발표 제목 (Title): Making WebGL Maps Speak: Scaling Accessibility in FOSS Geospatial Pipelines for Wildfire Risk Communications
초록 (Abstract): The FOSS geospatial pipeline behind a nationwide wildfire risk tool, including GDAL, PostGIS, Tippecanoe, and the accessibility patterns to make interactive web maps work for everyone.

발표 제목 (Title): QGIS 4 is coming and my plugins will break
초록 (Abstract): Will plugins really break when migrating them to QGIS 4? This talk addresses this concern.

발표 제목 (Title): Getting started with PostGIS
초록 (Abstract): This interactive workshop will detail how to install, configure, and use PostGIS at a basic level.

발표 제목 (Title): Improving Water Data Access with Cloud Native Geospatial Formats
초록 (Abstract): How the Geoconnex project has leveraged FlatGeobuf and GeoParquet to improve the user experience of analyzing hydrological information across the United States.

발표 제목 (Title): Building an MCP Server Ecosystem on Japan's National-Scale Geospatial Open Data Platform
초록 (Abstract): How we connected Japan's national open geospatial data platform to AI agents using the Model Context Protocol for infrastructure maintenance use cases.

발표 제목 (Title): Natural Language Querying of STAC Catalogs Using LLMs for Geospatial Visualization
초록 (Abstract): A framework that uses Gemma 3 to translate natural language into STAC queries, automating GISTDA's disaster data retrieval and MapLibre visualization.

발표 제목 (Title): Building a Spatial Archive of Feminist Activism.
초록 (Abstract): Geochicas turns 10 this year with the Atlas 8M: a community-governed, open-source archive of 3,183 georeferenced feminist mobilizations across 63 countries.

발표 제목 (Title): Does Re:Earth Dream of a Peaceful Earth?
초록 (Abstract): Re:Earth and Eukarya have been engaged in various initiatives related to peace and education, presented in conjunction with the FOSS4G conference being held in Hiroshima.

발표 제목 (Title): OpenChizu: Turning Japan's Open Data into a Modern Web Map
초록 (Abstract): A modern vector map of Japan built from GSI open data and OpenStreetMap, built on vector tiles integrating with MapLibre and open-source tools.

발표 제목 (Title): Extending Reearth CMS with API-First Design and Developer-Friendly Data Workflows
초록 (Abstract): Recent development features in Reearth CMS including an API-first architecture, an interactive API playground, and flexible import/export pipelines.

발표 제목 (Title): From OpenLayers Legacy to GIFramework: Modernizing GeoSampa's Web Mapping Interface
초록 (Abstract): GeoSampa 2.0 modernizes Sao Paulo's geospatial platform through the adoption of the OSGeo-based GIFramework Maps.

발표 제목 (Title): Expanding Map Perception: Designing Inclusive Experiences for Colorblind Users
초록 (Abstract): This study proposes accessible map design approaches that reduce reliance on color using inclusive palettes, symbols, patterns, and visual hierarchy for colorblind users.

발표 제목 (Title): Geoprivacy in the Field: Integrating Privacy-Preserving Spatial Transformations into the QField Mobile GIS Platform
초록 (Abstract): A QField plugin integrating geoprivacy transformations directly into the mobile editing workflow, allowing sensitive point locations to be modified within the app.

발표 제목 (Title): Rethinking Feature Data Services: A Composable Architecture for Geospatial APIs
초록 (Abstract): We introduce Meros, an open-source feature data service demonstrating how decoupling APIs from databases creates highly flexible, resilient, and easily deployable services.

발표 제목 (Title): Use of Open Source Software in the ESA Planetary Science Archive
초록 (Abstract): Overview of how the ESA Planetary Science Archive (PSA) uses OpenLayers, GeoServer, Three.js, and PostGIS for planetary data including Mars.

발표 제목 (Title): Porting JTS Interior Point Algorithm to TypeScript and Rust/WASM
초록 (Abstract): An open-source project that ports the JTS (Java Topology Suite) InteriorPoint algorithm to both TypeScript and Rust/WASM.

발표 제목 (Title): State of TerriaJS
초록 (Abstract): TerriaJS is an open-source TS/JS framework for building rich, 2D and 3D web-based geospatial data platforms deployed in Digital Earth Australia and government platforms worldwide.

발표 제목 (Title): spCF: an R package for coarse-to-fine spatial modeling
초록 (Abstract): The R package 'spCF' provides functions for coarse-to-fine spatial modeling, enabling scalable spatial prediction, regression, and multi-scale analysis for large samples.

발표 제목 (Title): Lack of Open-Source Border Datasets on Sensitive Border Areas: The Case of the China-Bhutan Border
초록 (Abstract): Open-source border datasets have limitations in contested regions. Using the Bhutan-China border case, this study shows village locations may not align with available boundaries.

발표 제목 (Title): Terra Draw - bring drawing feature to all map applications
초록 (Abstract): Terra Draw is a drawing library having unified interfaces for most of mapping libraries. This talk updates the state of TerraDraw and maplibre-gl-terradraw.

발표 제목 (Title): Kumoy: Turn your QGIS Maps into Cloud-Native
초록 (Abstract): With Kumoy, you can push your QGIS projects into an interactive web map in just a few clicks, with role management and data sync.

발표 제목 (Title): V-World Platform Enhancement for Digital Twin-Based Geospatial Services
초록 (Abstract): V-World, Korea's national geospatial platform by MOLIT, advances 3D services and analytics with improved data management and Geo-AI integration.

발표 제목 (Title): Beyond Metadata Search: STAC, Vector Embeddings, and GeoAI
초록 (Abstract): This talk shows how to combine STAC for structured discovery and vector embeddings for semantic similarity to support modern geospatial analysis workflows.

발표 제목 (Title): From Spatial Database to Public Accessibility Viewer: Open-Source Geospatial Support for Inclusive Mobility Planning in Slovenia
초록 (Abstract): An open-source geospatial system in Slovenia providing a unified accessibility database and public web viewer for inclusive mobility planning.

발표 제목 (Title): AI-accelerated development and FOSS4G - a perspective into the future
초록 (Abstract): A few collected thoughts about the impact of the current coding revolution for the future of FOSS4G projects.

발표 제목 (Title): State of PDAL
초록 (Abstract): PDAL is Point Data Abstraction Library. It is a C/C++ open source library for translating and processing point cloud data. Update on new features and capabilities over the last 2 years.

발표 제목 (Title): Cartographic Patterns: Comparing Multimodal Transport Systems in diametrically opposite cities
초록 (Abstract): A cartographic comparison of transport infrastructure in two dissimilar cities utilizing space-time cubes and the cities' transport index.

발표 제목 (Title): Utilizing detailed geographic information open data
초록 (Abstract): In Japan, open data of detailed geographic information is made public, and we will propose ways to effectively utilize these data using water catchment area analysis.

발표 제목 (Title): The modern STAC software ecosystem
초록 (Abstract): A tour of the latest-and-greatest in the STAC software ecosystem, with a focus on demonstrations and use-cases.

발표 제목 (Title): Between coffee farmers and an EU portal: When is a polygon actually valid?
초록 (Abstract): This talk explores practical problems at the crossroads of coffee industry, geodata, and EU regulation around what actually constitutes a valid polygon.

발표 제목 (Title): Browser-based raster reprojection with GPU-accelerated pixel resampling
초록 (Abstract): A way to stream unmodified COG data directly from object storage and reproject the imagery in the browser without a server in the middle.

발표 제목 (Title): Introduction to Point Tiler: A tool for converting large-scale point cloud data into 3D Tiles
초록 (Abstract): point-tiler is a Rust CLI that converts massive LAS/LAZ point clouds into modern 3D Tiles (v1.1) via a glTF/GLB-centric workflow.

발표 제목 (Title): Finding the Street-Level Images You Need in Mapillary
초록 (Abstract): Mapillary hosts over 2 billion street-level images as open data. This presentation introduces filtering methods to remove low-quality or irrelevant images.

발표 제목 (Title): Re:Earth: Empowering Non-Experts with Open Source WebGIS — Case Studies from Educational Settings
초록 (Abstract): Re:Earth is an open source, no-code WebGIS platform built on Cesium. This talk presents two educational case studies showing how open source geospatial tools empower non-expert users.
